title: Walkie Talkie
body:
# Walkie Talkie ![wt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d5badbe9f53f0c2a4d2dae91a2aefb8b654abf_0.webp)

A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds functional walkie-talkies with real voice communication via [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) integration.

## Features

- **Real Voice Communication** — talk to other players on the same frequency using Simple Voice Chat
- **16 Channels (1–16)** — select any frequency through the in-game GUI
- **ON/OFF Toggle** — enable or disable your walkie-talkie at any time
- **Radio Sound Effects** — audio is processed with a radio effect (compression, noise); also supports distortion, echo, low-pass, and high-pass filters
- **Fake Sound System** — broadcast OGG audio files through a radio channel using commands
- **Custom Sounds** — power on/off clicks and ambient static noise play during transmissions
- **Full Inventory Scanning** — walkie-talkies in your inventory (not just hands) are detected and joined to channels

## Items

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| Walkie Talkie ![wt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d5badbe9f53f0c2a4d2dae91a2aefb8b654abf_0.webp) | Standard working radio |
| Beta Walkie Talkie ![bwt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/259f8c41cf99b7ee0bc5494fb8cb5026b7909694_0.webp) | Alternative variant (functional) |
| Broken Walkie Talkie ![bwt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb7dffdc672efc533e2d103e86e6e11bf23625b_0.webp) | Non-functional decorative item |

## Crafting

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a757d09273949c51d243896886bb3ecc4b62a9b3_0.webp)

## Usage

### Walkie Talkie ![wt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d5badbe9f53f0c2a4d2dae91a2aefb8b654abf_0.webp)

1. **Craft** a Walkie Talkie
2. **Shift + right-click** to open the frequency selector GUI
3. **Click a channel** (1–16) to set your frequency
4. **Toggle ON/OFF** with the button at the bottom of the GUI
5. **Hold right-click** (PCM) with the walkie-talkie in hand to start transmitting
6. Release to stop transmitting — other players on the same channel will hear you

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e04af34b606253d54bd121b0892b84adca616dec.png)

![screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5cb5350de2d5430c638359e787ec9263c246b4.png)

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/sw4wt soundeffect` | List all available sound effects |
| `/sw4wt soundeffect <effect>` | Set a sound effect (radio, distortion, echo, lowpass, highpass, none) |
| `/sw4wt fakesound <file> <frequency>` | Play an audio file on a specific frequency |
| `/sw4wt stopfakesound <frequency>` | Stop a fake sound on a specific frequency |
| `/sw4wt listfakesounds` | List all configured fake sounds |
| `/sw4wt reloadfakesounds` | Reload fake sound configuration |

Place `.ogg` files in `config/sw4wt/fakesounds/`.

## Configuration

Config file: `config/sw4wt/sw4wt-config.json`

| Option | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `effect` | string | Current radio effect (radio, distortion, echo, lowpass, highpass, none) |
| `fakeSounds` | object | Map of frequency → audio file name |

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **≥0.18.4**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Super GUI Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/sgl)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
